cocoon — project-aware container workspace generator

Run cocoon from any project directory to read its workspace.toml and
materialize a Dev Container or plain docker-compose stack tailored to
that repository.

Usage:
  cocoon [flags]
  cocoon [command]

Available Commands:
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  gen         Generate .devcontainer/ artifacts from workspace.toml
  help        Help about any command
  init        Create workspace.toml in the current directory
  lock        Resolve plugin versions and write the lock file for reproducible builds
  plugin      Inspect and author cocoon plugins (list / show / pin / scaffold)
  self-update Replace this binary with the latest released version
  version     Print the cocoon binary version

Flags:
  -h, --help      help for cocoon
  -v, --version   version for cocoon

Use "cocoon [command] --help" for more information about a command.
